page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d2c.12xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. This instance features 48 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing 48 vCPUs. It is equipped with 176.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 3.67 GB of RAM per core, and operates on a KVM hypervisor.

A defining characteristic of this instance is its massive bundled local storage, consisting of 23,837 GB of HDD capacity. This high-density storage configuration is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. The reliance on HDD technology rather than SSDs represents a significant architectural tradeoff, prioritizing raw storage volume and sequential throughput over low-latency random input/output operations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.d2c.12xlarge offers a high volume of local storage per unit of compute, making it a specialized option for workloads that require massive data capacity without the premium cost of solid-state drives. The dedicated, non-hyperthreaded CPU cores ensure predictable compute performance. This profile is optimized for large-scale data warehousing, cold storage, log processing, and distributed file systems like HDFS where sequential disk access dominates.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d2c.12xlarge is an x86_64 server instance featuring 48 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It is configured with 176.0 GB of memory, providing 3.67 GB of RAM per core, and operates on a KVM hypervisor. The instance is characterized by its massive local storage capacity of 23,837 GB of HDD storage, supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. Because it utilizes HDD storage instead of SSDs, the instance trades random I/O performance for high-density, cost-effective storage capacity. The dedicated, single-threaded CPU cores deliver highly predictable compute performance. This hardware profile is engineered for workloads requiring substantial local storage capacity, such as distributed file systems, data warehousing, log aggregation, and sequential data processing tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d2c.12xlarge is an x86_64 server with 48 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 176 GB RAM, and 23,837 GB of local HDD storage, designed for high-capacity sequential data workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d2c.12xlarge features 48 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 176 GB RAM, and 23,837 GB of local HDD storage for data-intensive workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity storage instance featuring dedicated physical cores and over twenty-three terabytes of local HDD storage for sequential data processing.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated physical Intel Xeon cores with single-thread execution.
176 GB of system memory providing 3.67 GB per core.
23,837 GB of bundled local HDD storage for high-density capacity.
Optimized for distributed file systems, log processing, and data warehousing.
